decisions.decision: Discard stash-captured edits as stale (uv.lock 1.1.0->2.0.0 already in HEAD; config.json identical; install.sh mode change was OneDrive artifact)
decisions.rationale: Stash was based on old HEAD 3263def; gitea's 8 newer commits had already incorporated equivalent work
User confirmed those issues were resolved later
User's choice; org.lightningjim.MusicStreamer.png is XDG desktop integration asset; brand logos co-locate naturally

decisions.decision: Repoint origin to WAN hostname coldpool.myqnapcloud.com:2222 and drop redundant gitea remote
decisions.rationale: Both pointed at same Gitea server; single origin works LAN and off-network

decisions.decision: Leave references to logo paths in archived Phase 44 planning docs unchanged
decisions.rationale: Phase 44 is signed-off and shipped; updating archived docs would distort historical record. .ico already generated and committed.

context_notes: Recovery session after OneDrive lost data. Local repo was at 3263def, gitea had 8 newer commits including v2.0 milestone close. All tracked-file losses recoverable via FF-merge from gitea. Final HEAD: logo commit 77cdfed pushed to origin. v2.0 milestone is shipped/archived. Single remote: origin -> coldpool.myqnapcloud.com:2222. Previous HANDOFF.json (Phase 44 plan-phase, Apr 24) is stale and superseded — Phase 44 has since been completed and shipped.
